scripts.dev: concurrently --names "FRONTEND,BACKEND,CHATBOT,RESUME,MOCK" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow,magenta,blue" "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix agentic-chatbot/backend" "npm run dev --prefix resume_analyser/backend" "npm run dev --prefix new_mock/server"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix agentic-chatbot/backend && npm install --prefix resume_analyser/backend && npm install --prefix new_mock/server
